sensor: 1/1.8" CMOS (8x 4MP panoramic array + 1x 4MP PTZ detail channel)

lens.focal_length_mm: 2 (fixed, panoramic array, x8); 6.0-252 (zoom, 42x optical/16x digital, PTZ detail channel)

field_of_view_deg: 360 horizontal / 110 vertical (panoramic array); 59.47-2.20 horizontal / 35.62-1.24 vertical (PTZ detail channel)
features: Multi-Imager PTZ: fixed 8-sensor 360 degree panoramic array (4MP x8) combined with an independent 42x optical/16x digital zoom PTZ detail camera on the same head
panoramic channel: up to 30fps at 11520x2700 stitched; PTZ detail channel: up to 60fps at 2688x1520
video codec not specified on official spec sheet (no Compression row present, unlike other ACTi models)

built-in analytics: Smart Motion Detection (People Detection, Vehicle Detection), Smart Intrusion Protection (, People Line Crossing Detection, People Intrusion Detection, People Enter Area Detection, People Exit Area Detection, ...
ONVIF Compliant: Yes, Profile S, Profile G, Profile T, Profile M

home_assistant.notes: Use ONVIF integration. RTSP port is 7070 by default.

blue_iris.notes: Select 'ACTi' profile. Default RTSP port is 7070.
